@graph.name: Income Tax Services in Rajkot | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Income Tax Services in Rajkot. From ₹1,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Income tax return filing (ITR-1 to ITR-7), tax planning, not. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: Which ITR form should I file?

acceptedAnswer.text: ITR-1 for salaried (up to ₹50L), ITR-2 for capital gains/multiple properties, ITR-3 for business income, ITR-4 for presumptive taxation.

mainEntity.name: What is the due date for ITR filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: 31st July for individuals (non-audit), 31st October for audit cases, 30th November for transfer pricing.

mainEntity.name: Can you represent me in income tax appeals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle CIT(A) appeals, ITAT appeals, Section 264 revisions, and settlement commission applications.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide income tax services in Rajkot?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Rajkot, Gujarat. Engineering and auto-parts manufacturing centre. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

mainEntity.name: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Rajkot?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Rajkot clients.

mainEntity.name: How do I get started with income tax services in Rajkot?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Rajkot businesses with no location surcharges.
